title: Bringing Canva & Figma into your monday.com workflow
excerpt: Design and project management often live in separate worlds. Designers work in Canva or Figma, while project updates, feedback, and timelines are tracked in monday.com. That constant back-and-forth? It’s a drain on produ…

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Design and project management often live in separate worlds. Designers work in Canva or Figma, while project updates, feedback, and timelines are tracked in monday.com. That constant back-and-forth? It’s a drain on productivity.

That’s why we built the Canva + Figma: Integration Embed app for monday.com.

What the app does:

Embed designs inside item views, boards, or dashboards — no more switching tabs
Live syncing — changes made in Canva or Figma show up automatically in monday.com
Fast previews — optimized for speed, even with large files
Per-item embeds — link a specific design to each item to track progress clearly

Whether you’re managing a product launch, marketing campaign, or internal creative requests — this app helps keep context, feedback, and design all in one place.

You can find it on the monday.com marketplace. Setup is quick, and you’ll be up and running in under 2 minutes.

If you’ve tried it, we’d love to hear how you’re using it. And if not — give it a shot and let us know what you’d like to see next.

Book a demo with us here
